payload.answer: The proposal is too broad for durable memory as a single conversation_summary card containing the entire transcript. Please choose a repair path that preserves only the relevant, stable facts.
citations: LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.
repair_options: Extract only a concise summary of stable, durable facts and discard transcript-level detail.
Split the transcript into smaller topic-based summaries instead of one monolithic card.
Keep the transcript out of memory and save only a user-approved distilled takeaway.
If multiple facts are present, store them as separate candidate memories rather than a single conversation_summary.
Ask the user which specific details from the transcript should be remembered.
